zh.lifeSummary: 當Alain III de Rohan於1135年在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉蒙陶班-德-布利塔尼受洗時，他的父親Vicomte Alain II de Rohan26歲，母親Blanche de Carhaix21歲。他於1184年6月23日之後與Françoise of Corbey結婚。他去世於從1168年到1195年在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維特雷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alain III de Rohan于1135年在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉蒙陶班-德-布利塔尼受洗时，他的父亲Vicomte Alain II de Rohan26岁，母亲Blanche de Carhaix21岁。他于1184年6月23日之后与Françoise of Corbey结婚。他去世于从1168年到1195年在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉維特雷。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Rohan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Brigid, Kieran, Oonagh, Padraig, Siobhan.
Irish (Kerry and Cork): from Ó Ruadhacháin or Ó Robhacháin, see Rowan .
Breton and English: habitational name from Rohan in Morbihan, Brittany (France).

variants.name: Rowan
meanings: Irish: from Ó Ruadháin or Ó Ruaidhín, both meaning ‘descendant of Ruadhán’, a personal name from a diminutive of ruadh ‘red’. See also Rooney .

Irish: from Ó Ruadhacháin, ‘son of Ruadhachán’, a personal name from a diminutive of ruadh ‘red’ (also used as a placename and Anglicized as Roughan). Compare also Rogan (Ó Ruadhagáin), of which may be a variant, both it and Ó Ruadhacháin being found in Ulster and Connacht.
Irish: from Ó Robhacháin, the name of a scattered ecclesiastical family, found in Clare in the 16th and 17th centuries. The personal name was earlier Reabhachán ‘skillful, artful’.

nameMeanings.name: Alain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Breton form of Alan, now common in all parts of France. See Alan .

nameMeanings.name: III
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Japanese Yuko, Aiko, Hideaki, Hiroki, Hiroyuki, Isamu, Kaoru, Katsumi, Keiichiro, Kenji, Masako, Masayuki.
Japanese: variously written, sometimes with characters used phonetically; the most probable meanings are 仁井 ‘benevolent well’, 新居 ‘new residence’, or 新井 ‘new well’. It is not common in Japan.

en.lifeSummary: When Alain III de Rohan was christened in 1135, in Montauban-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, his father, Vicomte Alain II de Rohan, was 26 and his mother, Blanche de Carhaix, was 21. He married Françoise of Corbey after 23 June 1184. He died from 1168 to 1195, in Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alain III de Rohan a été baptisé en 1135, à Montauban-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Vicomte Alain II de Rohan, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Blanche de Carhaix, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Françoise of Corbey après 23 juin 1184. Il est décédé du 1168 au 1195, à Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alain III de Rohan 1135 in Montauban-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich getauft wurde, war sein Vater Vicomte Alain II de Rohan 26 und seine Mutter Blanche de Carhaix 21. Er hat nach 23. Juni 1184 Françoise of Corbey geheiratet. Er starb von 1168 bis 1195 in Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alain III de Rohan è stato battezzato nel 1135 nel Montauban-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Vicomte Alain II de Rohan, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Blanche de Carhaix, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Françoise of Corbey dopo il 23 giugno 1184. Morì da 1168 a 1195, nel Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Alain III de Rohanが1135年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインモンタウバン-デ-ブレタグンで洗礼を受けた時，父Vicomte Alain II de Rohanは26歳，母Blanche de Carhaixは21歳であった。1184年6月23日以後にFrançoise of Corbeyと結婚した。彼はから1168年まで1195年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインヴィトルeで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Alain III de Rohan(이)가 1135년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 몽오반-데-브레타그니에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그의 아버지 Vicomte Alain II de Rohan(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Blanche de Carhaix(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1184년 6월 23일 이후 Françoise of Corbey(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1168년 부터 1195년 까지 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 비트e에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alain III de Rohan foi batizado em 1135, em Montauban-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Vicomte Alain II de Rohan, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Blanche de Carhaix, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Françoise of Corbey após 23 de junho de 1184. Ele faleceu de 1168 a 1195, em Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alain III de Rohan был крещен в 1135 г. в местности монтаубан-де-бретагн, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Vicomte Alain II de Rohan было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Blanche de Carhaix, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Françoise of Corbey после 23 июнь 1184 г. Он умер с 1168 по 1195 в местности витрe, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция.

sm.from 1168 to 1195: mai le 1168 e o'o I le 1195

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alain III de Rohan se bautizó en 1135, en Montauban-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Vicomte Alain II de Rohan, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Blanche de Carhaix, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Françoise of Corbey después de 23 de junio de 1184. Murió desde 1168 hasta 1195, en Vitré, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia.
